introSection: Dragon's Apprentice is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Legoland Malaysia in Iskandar Puteri, Johor, Malaysia. It is located in the same area as the larger Dragon but is aimed at younger children.
fullText: Dragon's Apprentice is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Legoland Malaysia in Iskandar Puteri, Johor, Malaysia. It is located in the same area as the larger Dragon but is aimed at younger children.
